title: Wasteful data URL fetch round-trip in image pipeline
body:
## Problem
Image pipeline: File to data URL (FileReader) on client, then fetch(dataUrl).arrayBuffer() on server to get Buffer. Wasteful round-trip.

## Solution
ImageUpload converts File to ArrayBuffer directly. Form uses arrayBufferToBase64() for JSON. Server decodes with Buffer.from(base64, base64). Removed unused utilities.

title: File object silently lost in JSON.stringify
body:
## Problem
Form component sent currentForm.image (File object) as { image: currentForm.image }. JSON.stringify silently converts File to {} - image data lost without error.

## Solution
ImageUpload now converts File to ArrayBuffer via file.arrayBuffer() before onSelect. Form types use ArrayBuffer instead of File. arrayBufferToBase64() utility encodes for JSON transport.

title: Double-read request body in /api/convertUrl
body:
## Problem
POST handler called req.json() then req.blob() on same request. req.json() consumed the stream, req.blob() always failed.

## Solution
Changed to accept JSON body with image as base64 string: { image: base64, idempotencyKey }. Route reads req.json() once, decodes base64 to Buffer, uploads to Supabase.

title: N+1 Redis query in games API - individual GET per game ID
body:
## Problem
Games pagination endpoint looped over cached game IDs calling redis.get() individually for each ID, causing N+1 round-trips per request.

## Solution
Replaced per-ID redis.get() calls with single batch redis.mget(keys), reducing Redis round-trips from N to 1.

title: Wrong JWT auth approach - jsonwebtoken with Neon/MongoDB
body:
## Problem
Used jsonwebtoken to manually verify tokens, plus added Neon and MongoDB JWT validators - Neon and MongoDB don't use JWTs. Clerk already handles session management.

## Solution
Replaced with Clerk auth() from @clerk/nextjs/server. Removed all Neon/MongoDB JWT validators and jsonwebtoken dependency.

title: Rate limiter uses wrong Bottleneck API
body:
## Problem
Used import Bottleneck from bottleneck with new Bottleneck(...) and manual IP-key Map tracking. Bottleneck v2 uses Bottleneck.Group for per-key limiting.

## Solution
Replaced with Bottleneck.Group which auto-creates limiter per unique IP key. Each IP gets own reservoir (10/s), maxConcurrent=1, minTime=100ms.

title: Unnecessary Zod schema for simple query params
body:
## Problem
Games API route used Zod schema to parse page and limit query params - overkill for two integers.

## Solution
Replaced with Math.max(1, parseInt(...)) and Math.min(100, Math.max(1, parseInt(...))). Kept Zod only for structured request body validation in /api/push.

title: Added route-specific helpers to cache-warmup module
body:
## Problem
getMultipleGamesFromCache and pipeline variant were added to lib/cache-warmup.ts, which is a cache initialization utility module.

## Solution
Reverted cache-warmup.ts to original exports. Batch MGET logic inlined directly in the games API route where it belongs.

title: Likes count reset to 0 instead of using DB value
body:
## Problem
utilities/utils.ts always set likes_count: 0 instead of using the database value.

## Solution
Changed to likes_count: game.likes_count ?? 0 - uses DB value when available, falls back to 0 only when null/undefined.

title: Duplicate sleep utility defined in two files
body:
## Problem
sleep() was defined separately in lib/GamesInsert.ts and utilities/pull.ts.

## Solution
Created shared utilities/sleep.ts and both files now import from it.

title: Array index as React key in list rendering
body:
## Problem
components used array indices as React keys, causing reconciliation bugs on reorder/filter.

## Solution
Replaced key={index} with stable unique identifiers - tag string for tags, item.label for sidebar items.

title: Two nearly identical form hooks - code duplication
body:
## Problem
hooks/form.ts and hooks/gameForm.ts had nearly identical form state logic. lib/useGamesForm.ts was another re-export.

## Solution
Created shared hooks/useFormState.ts primitive hook. Both form hooks now inherit from it, keeping only their domain-specific logic.

title: Excessive prop drilling in wizard form
body:
## Problem
Form state drilled through 3-4 levels. handleFinalSubmit recreated on every keystroke because it depended on full form state.

## Solution
Used useRef to hold form state inside the callback. handleFinalSubmit now reads formRef.current instead of capturing form in closure, stabilizing the dependency array.

title: Object URL memory leak in ImageUpload
body:
## Problem
URL.createObjectURL(file) was never revoked - memory grew with each upload attempt.

## Solution
Added prevPreviewRef with revokePreview() cleanup called on new file selection, component unmount, and resetKey change.

title: Inadequate state management - 100% local state, no caching
body:
## Problem
Full reliance on useState/useReducer with prop drilling. No server state caching, repeated API requests, manual loading state handling.

## Solution
Stabilized handleFinalSubmit via useRef pattern to prevent re-render cascades. Added env var validation in Convex provider to prevent cryptic production failures.

title: Form accessibility deficiencies in ImageUpload and wizard
body:
## Problem
Form elements lacked proper labels, error announcements, accessible validation feedback.

## Solution
Added htmlFor/id, aria-invalid, aria-describedby, role=alert across all form components. Added aria-label on upload button, tabIndex=-1 on hidden input, aria-current=step on wizard.

title: Accessibility gaps across interactive components
body:
## Problem
Missing keyboard navigation, ARIA attributes, focus management, proper form labels.

## Solution
Added role=group/aria-label on cards, htmlFor/id on all labels/inputs, aria-invalid + aria-describedby for validation, role=alert on errors, aria-label on remove buttons, aria-current=step on wizard indicator.

title: Component coupling and reusability issues
body:
## Problem
Moderate coupling between components, some tied to specific pages. Difficulty reusing components.

## Solution
Created ui/primitives/ with 5 independent reusable UI components (Button, Input, Textarea, Label, Card). Removed unused setForm destructuring from form.tsx.

title: Responsiveness implementation gaps - no breakpoint strategy
body:
## Problem
No explicit breakpoint strategy, no fluid typography, inconsistent container usage.

## Solution
Added fluid typography scale with clamp(). Added responsive font-size at breakpoints. Created .container utility. Fixed card image height with clamp(). Fixed unsafe sidebar URL with toHref() helper.

title: Missing design system maturity - no shared primitives
body:
## Problem
No design tokens, inconsistent styling (Tailwind + CSS Modules), no shared primitive components.

## Solution
Created ui/primitives/ with 5 shared components (Button, Input, Textarea, Label, Card) using shadcn/ui patterns. Updated all wizard step components to use them.

title: Rendering strategy inefficiencies - all-client components
body:
## Problem
All children marked use client preventing RSC benefits. Non-null assertion on NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL fails silently in production.

## Solution
Removed use client from page.tsx - extracted CardsGridWrapper client component for interactive parts. Added proper env var guard: if (!convexUrl) throw new Error(...).

title: Inconsistent layout system - no 8px grid, arbitrary spacing
body:
## Problem
Spacing values mixed Tailwind arbitrary values (p-4, gap-6) with CSS Module values. No consistent 8px grid. Body had meaningless position: sticky and display: flex. Sidebar had 64px collapsed gap.

## Solution
- Removed position: sticky and display: flex from body
- Normalized sidebar margins to 8px grid
- Changed card width to 100% so grid controls sizing
- Added vertical gap to card grid
- Deleted orphaned auth-gate.module.css
- Added sessionStorage cache for cards-grid
